title: Pharmacokinetic Drug Interaction Studies of Limnetrelvir with Midazolam and Itraconazole in Healthy Participants.
abstract: Limnetrelvir is an oral inhibitor of the SARS-CoV-2 main protease (Mpro) and was developed with the aim of achieving broad-spectrum efficacy against SARS-CoV-2 and emerging variants. The aim of this work was to evaluate potential CYP3A4 drug-drug interactions (DDIs) of limnetrelvir.
